sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement system documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Item Acquisition & Ability Scaling
special_mechanics.description: Link acquires various items throughout adventure including stronger swords for increased damage, heart containers for life meter increase, magic rings for damage reduction, boomerang for stunning enemies, and magical recorder for dungeon teleportation

special_mechanics.name: Flip-Screen Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Player controls Link from flip-screen overhead perspective navigating overworld and dungeons with screen-based transitions

tier_notes: Tier 1 data represents empirical/qualitative information. Original Legend of Zelda for NES/FDS uses flip-screen top-down perspective with grid-based level design. No precise physics values documented in available sources. Game mechanics emphasize exploration and item collection rather than complex movement physics.
